# Karolina Kempa

### Technology at [A&L Goodbody](https://theorg.com/org/al-goodbody)

Contact

Karolina Kempa has a diverse work experience in various industries. Karolina started their career as a Smoothie Operator at Jump Juice Bars in 2017 and later worked as a Barista at Costa Coffee. In 2018, they worked as a Waitress at Agentur Balance, where they communicated in German and served food and drinks at events. In 2020, they were a Placement Student at Concannon Solicitors. In 2021, they worked as a Researcher at The Economist Intelligence Unit and as a Consultant at Sastre Consulting Ltd. Karolina also gained experience as a Barista at Insomnia Coffee Company before joining ORIX Aviation as a Legal Executive in 2022. Karolina is currently a Trainee Solicitor specializing in Structured Finance and Debt Capital Markets at A&L Goodbody LLP since 2023. Karolina has also held leadership positions such as External Convener at The Literary and Debating Society, where they managed the team's competitive affairs and oversaw the society's treasury.

Karolina Kempa's education history began in 2011 when they attended Athlone Community College and obtained their Leaving Certificate in an unspecified field of study. Karolina then pursued a Bachelor of Civil Law (International) at the University of Galway from 2016 to 2020, focusing on law. During their time at the university, they also participated in the Erasmus+ Programme at Leipzig University in 2018 and 2019, where they studied German Law, German Language, and German Literature.

More recently, in 2021 and 2022, Karolina Kempa enrolled at the Law Society of Ireland as an FE1 Candidate, continuing their education in the field of law. Additionally, outside of their formal education, Karolina Kempa obtained certifications such as First Aid Response from the Pre-Hospital Emergency Care Council in November 2019. Karolina also completed various online courses through LinkedIn Learning, including Algorithmic Trading and Stocks Essential Training, Learning PowerPoint2019, Managing Your Personal Investments, and Understanding Capital Markets. The specific months and years of obtaining the LinkedIn Learning course certificates are not provided.

Leinster, Ireland
